content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the complete failure reconciliation implementation across 8 modified source files (~8000 lines of diff). The new `failure_reconciliation.rs` (1178 lines of logic + 1753 lines of tests) correctly implements all acceptance criteria: BeadFailed journal events, bead left open on failure, attempt counting across retries, NeedsOperator escalation after MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES(3), idempotent replay handling, and structured tracing. The controller changes properly handle Blocked state context preservation and resume transitions. The stale started_at guard in `fs.rs` prevents corruption from out-of-order replays. Both daemon loop and CLI sync paths correctly delegate to the failure reconciliation handler. All 17 failure_reconciliation tests pass, cargo clippy -D warnings is clean, and cargo fmt --check passes. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
